summary: Customer/Vendor Patch Flows Testing - All 7 flows tested. 17/17 backend tests pass. Fixed datetime sorting bug in customer_invoice_routes.py. All UI pages load correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer/Vendor patch flows all working. Customer invoices page shows table-first view with status badges (Paid, Under Review, Awaiting Payment, Rejected). Customer orders page shows table + detail panel. Partner fulfillment page has filter buttons including 'Ready to Fulfill'. Admin finance queue shows payment proofs for approval. Notification bell works in customer and partner portals.

FLOW_1_product_checkout_invoice_visibili.details: POST /api/live-commerce/product-checkout creates invoice. GET /api/customer/invoices returns invoices from both collections with correct status mapping.

FLOW_2_payment_proof_upload_under_review.details: Customer invoices page shows 'Under Review' status for invoices with uploaded payment proofs. 'Pay Invoice' and 'Resubmit Proof' buttons visible.

FLOW_3_payment_approval_order_visibility.details: Admin finance queue at /admin/finance-queue shows payment proofs for approval. GET /api/live-commerce/finance/queue returns queue items. Customer orders page shows orders after payment approval.

FLOW_4_customer_bell_notifications.details: NotificationBell component with data-testid='notification-bell' works. GET /api/notifications returns notifications for customer. Dropdown shows 'No unread notifications' when empty.

FLOW_5_vendor_bell_notifications.details: GET /api/notifications works for partner token. Partner portal has notification bell in sidebar header.

FLOW_6_vendor_fulfillment_page.details: Partner fulfillment page at /partner/fulfillment loads with filter buttons: All Jobs, Ready to Fulfill, Pending, Accepted, In Progress, Completed, Issues. GET /api/partner-portal/fulfillment-jobs?status=ready_to_fulfill works.

FLOW_7_partner_sidebar_vendor_accounts.details: Partner sidebar shows correct items based on partner type. Demo partner has all roles (product partner + affiliate + vendor) so shows all sections. Code correctly handles vendor-only accounts.
FLOW_7_partner_sidebar_vendor_accounts.note: Demo partner account has multiple roles, so sidebar shows all sections. For vendor-only accounts, affiliate items would be hidden.

backend_api_tests.partner_login: PASS - returns access_token instead of token
backend_api_tests.customer_invoices_list: PASS - reads from both invoice collections

bug_fixed.issue: TypeError: '<' not supported between instances of 'datetime.datetime' and 'str' when sorting invoices
bug_fixed.fix: Added datetime to ISO string conversion in serialize_doc() for created_at, updated_at, paid_at, rejected_at fields
